acquisition method: operating in the data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode.
alkylation reagent: alkylated with sufficient iodoacetamide for 1 h at room temperature in the dark.
collision energy: the normalized collision energy was set as 32%.
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
instrument: analyzed by Q Exactive HF (X) mass spectrometer.
ionization type: with ion source of Nanospray Flex™ (ESI).
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM Dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1 h at 56 °C.
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM Dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1 h at 56 °C.
